calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-24-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

ELIZABETH MACDONALD, Esq. special appearance for plaintiff(s) XEROX CORPORATION,

Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was in file.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) MAX COPY & PRINT, LLC, A.C. for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $136,658.06
Prejudgment Interest - $34,346.90
Attorney's Fees - $4340.00
Costs - $604.95
Total judgment in the amount of $175,949.91

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

Notice Of Application For Writ Of Possession And Hearing Q
Off Calendar Apr-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
James Coy Driscoll, Atty. specially appearling for Plaintiff and moving party: XEROX CORPORATION; No appearances made by Defendant.

RULING: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff XEROX CORPORATION, A CORPORATION's Application For Writ Of Possession as to Defendant Max Copy & Print, LLC is granted. No opposition has been filed. The court waives the requirement of an undertaking by Plaintiff. The amount of the Defendant's undertaking to prevent Plaintiff from taking possession of the property is set in the amount of $11,000. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
